title: Improve config fetching architecture and testability
body:
## Background
PR #326 introduced config-service routing. Code review identified several valid improvements that are deferred to future work.

## Improvements

### Architecture
- [ ] Rename `fetchPlatformConfigWithCache` to `fetchRemoteConfigWithCache` for clarity
- [ ] Inject config service URL instead of reading from env directly (improves testability)

### Performance (low priority - not in hot path)
- [ ] Cache env var lookups in `init()` for `GetConfigServiceURL`
- [ ] Reuse `auth.Client` instance across config fetches

### Security (defense-in-depth, optional)
- [ ] Consider certificate pinning for default SaaS URL (trade-offs: complicates cert rotation, breaks TLS inspection proxies)

## Context
- PR: #326
- These are not bugs - they're improvements for cleanliness and maintainability
- All items are low priority given current usage patterns
